creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Thu May 22 08:01:28 2014
New Revision: 354798
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/354798
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r354798/

Log:
  - Stage support
  
  PR:		189996
  Submitted by:	maintainer

Deleted:
  head/multimedia/py-kaa-metadata/pkg-plist
Modified:
  head/multimedia/py-kaa-metadata/Makefile

Modified: head/multimedia/py-kaa-metadata/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/multimedia/py-kaa-metadata/Makefile	Thu May 22 08:00:58 2014	(r354797)
+++ head/multimedia/py-kaa-metadata/Makefile	Thu May 22 08:01:28 2014	(r354798)
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	kaa-metadata
 PORTVERSION=	0.7.7
-PORTREVISION=	9
+PORTREVISION=	10
 CATEGORIES=	multimedia python
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/freevo/${PORTNAME}/${PORTVERSION}
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -18,9 +18,9 @@ RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
 USE_PYTHON=	2
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
+PYDISTUTILS_AUTOPLIST=	yes
 
 CFLAGS+=	-I${PREFIX}/include
 LDFLAGS+=	-L${PREFIX}/lib
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
